summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Deterministic validation classified #82562, #82585, #82665, and #82870 as security-sensitive, so those exact PR refs are routed to central security handling with no GitHub mutations. #82618 remains blocked for human follow-up because the job artifact labels it waiting on author and the job frontmatter requires human review for active_author_followup. No replacement fix artifact is emitted because the remaining safe actions are non-mutating routing or human gate decisions.
